mark.notRead: You haven't marked this material yet

review.title: Spaced Repetition
review.desc: The algorithm categorizes materials based on the time passed since the last read to optimize your memory.
review.allCaughtUp: Great job! You have no urgent materials to review.
review.forgottenDesc: Review date is heavily overdue. Urgent refresher recommended.
review.dueDesc: The perfect time to consolidate this in your memory.
review.masteredDesc: Read multiple times and safely stored in long-term memory.

sync.title: Database Synchronization
sync.desc: Enter your API URL for a two-way merge of your reading history.
